notes: CollectiveX backend registry: container images and backend source pins.
runtime/config.py backend-registry validates this file and emits the COLLX_* names
consumed by runtime/common.sh, runtime/prepare_backend.sh, and the launchers.
The commit is enforced at source fetch (rev-parse HEAD) and drives the build
cache key and the deep_ep wheel-tag probe. Changing a pin here changes what
the benchmark measures, so it belongs in review, not in a launcher.
Single multi-arch container for ALL NVIDIA SKUs: the tag is an OCI image
index covering linux/amd64 (B200) + linux/arm64 (GB200); enroot import
pulls the matching arch. cu130 = CUDA 13, system nccl.h in /usr/include.
v0.5.12-cu130 rejected: its 62 layers overflow enroot's overlay-based squash
creation on these nodes (failed to mount overlay: Invalid argument);
v0.5.11-cu130 imports cleanly. Runtime setup verifies the image-bundled
DeepEP build for the detected GPU target.
Single mi35x-tagged image bundles MoRI for all three CDNA SKUs
